sglang.title: [P/D] Support ipv6 in P/D scenario
sglang.author: thefacetakt
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Currently, the P/D setup does not support IPv6 instances. This PR adds IPv6 support.
Note: For P/D to work with IPv6, one must also enable IPv6 in Mooncake by setting the environment variable MC_USE_IPV6=1.
Modifications
The main changes in this PR involve ZMQ socket setup and hostname/IP

vllm.title: Add support for Prithvi in Online serving mode
vllm.author: mgazz
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR builds on top of #20072 and it enables the execution of Prithvi in online serving mode.
This is achieved by increasing the level of support for models that skip the tokenizer initialisation.
A longer description of the what we are trying to achieve is available in #20234.
This supersedes #20

vllm.title: [Feature] Add support for MoE models in the calibration-free RTN-based quantization
vllm.author: sakogan
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR enhances the work started in #18768.
It adds changes required to support MoE models (e.g., Llama4) quantized with RTN.
It also expands the relevant unit test to include an MoE model.
